creator: aryeh.friedman@gmail.com
text:
After deleting all my ports and reinstalling of them (on 2/20/2020) no application when running in a xfce4 environment recognizes/sees the up arrow.   All other arrow and cursor control keys work as expected.  The up arrow keys works correctly on the console and in twm (default window manager for startx).

Note the reason for the delete/reinstall was that I used hal as my I/O manager and as per /usr/port/UPDATES it is no longer supported and the only clean way I found to switch to libdevd was to do a complete delete and reinstall of *ALL* ports on the system.
